name: AMERICOLD REALTY TRUST
business: Americold is a global leader in temperature-controlled logistics and real estate, operating as a REIT. It provides cold storage and transportation solutions for the food supply chain.

exposures.sentence: Americold (NYSE: COLD) is a global leader in temperature-controlled logistics and real estate, supporting the safe, efficient movement of food worldwide.
We believe our ability to design, build and operate warehouses across the cold chain makes us an attractive storage solution for existing retailers and the growing e-tailer segment
increased automation of our warehouses, which may entail significant start-up costs and time and may not perform as expected

A failure of our IT systems, cybersecurity attacks or a breach of our information security systems, networks or processes could cause business disruptions and the loss of confidential information and may materially adversely affect our business.

The project includes the implementation of a new, best-in-class, cloud-based enterprise resource planning (ERP) software system as well as other transformation related initiatives including artificial intelligence related projects and market expansion initiatives.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of temperature-controlled storage facility in Baytown, TX
catalysts.sentence: On March 17, 2025, the Company completed the acquisition of one temperature-controlled storage facility, and the related operations, located in Baytown, TX (the Houston acquisition), for total cash consideration of $108.4 million.

catalysts.event: Sale of equity interest in SuperFrio joint venture
catalysts.sentence: On April 30, 2025, the Company completed the sale of its 14.99% equity interest in the SuperFrio joint venture to a third party for the Brazilian Real US dollar equivalent of $27.5 million.

catalysts.event: Negotiations for 9 additional collective bargaining agreements
catalysts.sentence: During 2026, we expect to engage in negotiations for an additional 9 agreements, which make up approximately 3% of our associate population, covering all or parts of 13 operating locations worldwide.

catalysts.event: Addition of paid parental leave program
catalysts.sentence: Additionally, we will be adding a paid parental leave program beginning in 2026.

catalysts.event: Expansion of Europe's existing systems into global platform
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, we plan to continue efforts expanding Europe's existing systems into our global platform.
